overall.description: A first-person perspective shot through a desert landscape at dusk, featuring Cyberpunk 2077's Badlands environment. The player moves from a roadside area with passing vehicles toward a quarantine zone marked by holographic warning signs and black smoke, eventually reaching a barrier with 'STAY BACK' and 'DO NOT CROSS' holographic projections.

events.description: dark-colored sedan passes by on the highway from right to left
begins moving off the paved road into desert scrubland

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the desert roadside, observing the distant holographic warnings

notable_agents.action: sedan driving along the highway, passing the camera's position

entered.detail: paved two-lane road stretching into the distance
group of yucca trees silhouetted against the sunset sky
hazy mountain silhouette on the horizon
glowing orange holographic text warning floating above the terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway at dusk, with the camera walking along the roadside. A sedan passes by on the road while distant holographic warning signs glow orange against the twilight sky. Joshua trees dot the left side of the frame as the camera moves steadily forward.

events.description: leaves the highway and enters uneven desert terrain with scrub vegetation
black smoke plume becomes visible rising from the ground ahead

agents.ego_description: moving off-road through desert scrub, heading toward the distant smoke and holographic warnings

entered.detail: thick black smoke rising vertically from a burning wreckage site
low bushes and dry grass covering the sandy ground

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the highway and ventures into the desert scrubland, moving toward a distant column of black smoke. The holographic 'STAY BACK' warning grows larger on the left as the terrain becomes rougher and the road disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: quarantine zone perimeter with holographic barriers

events.description: holographic 'DO NOT CROSS' barrier becomes visible through the smoke
navigates through denser vegetation including tall cacti

agents.ego_description: advancing steadily toward the smoke source, moving through increasingly dense desert vegetation

entered.detail: glowing orange holographic text barrier stretched across the desert
tall cactus with multiple arms silhouetted against the sky
smoldering debris field emitting thick black smoke

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the incident site through moderate desert vegetation, with saguaro cacti appearing on the right. The holographic quarantine barriers become clearly visible through the thickening smoke, and the burning wreckage source becomes identifiable.

scene_state.functional_zone: holographic quarantine barrier perimeter with dense cacti

events.description: reaches the holographic barrier system with multiple warning signs visible
passes very close to large saguaro cactus, temporarily obscuring right side of view

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense cacti and brush right up to the holographic quarantine barriers

entered.detail: large glowing triangular warning symbol floating in the air
thick cluster of saguaro and cholla cacti surrounding the path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through dense desert vegetation right up to the holographic quarantine zone, with 'DO NOT CROSS' and triangular warning signs glowing brightly overhead. The smoke source is now very close, and the camera navigates between large cacti while the holographic barriers dominate the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet desert highway at dusk toward a chaotic, smoke-filled quarantine zone. It begins by walking along the roadside as a sedan passes by, with orange holographic warning signs glowing in the distance amidst scattered Joshua trees. As the camera leaves the pavement and ventures into the scrubland, the road disappears and the terrain grows rougher while a distant column of black smoke becomes the primary focal point. The scene then shifts through moderate vegetation and saguaro cacti, bringing the burning wreckage and holographic barriers into clear view through the thickening haze. Finally, the camera navigates through dense desert brush to reach the edge of the quarantine zone, where bright DO NOT CROSS projections and triangular warning signs dominate the twilight sky.
